name: 反差萌開場
description: 現代女性面對古代哺乳需求時的尷尬反應，製造穿越劇特有的反差喜劇效果，瞬間拉近觀眾距離。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: My lady, the young prince must be hungry. After you finish your meal, please feed him some milk. Feed him milk. This is a little inappropriate. I'm still an inexperienced young girl.
